availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: DUAL PURPOSE: The Paul Anthony Facial and Eyebrown Trimmer for women comes with integrated dual heads, perfect for removing fine hairs like the upper lip, chin, cheeks, arms, leg,etc.or for shaping eyebrows for that flawless finish.

FACIAL HAIR: The high quality hyperallogenic stainless steel blade, The electric shaver doesn't pull hair from the root but instead gets close to the skin without causing any irritation even for sensitive skin, give you a refreshing experience and give back your baby-like skin without stubble, nicks or redness.

EYE BROW TRIMMER: This rechargeble handy eyebrow trimmer can accurately and gently remove the unwanted eyebrows easily. Provide you the gentle and painless eyebrow trimming experience in a safe way. Make your eyebrows always looking neat.

USB LITHIUM POWER: The powerful lithium battery is quickly recharged via any USB power source, using the cable supplied. A full charge will last approximately 90 minutes of use. Note: USB Power adaptor not included.
INTEGRAL LIGHT: Both shaver and eyebrow triimmer have an integral light to focus on the area in which is being trimmed.
description: The Paul Anthony SPA Pro Rechargeable Facial & Eyebrow trimmer is compact and portable, the perfect companion before you go on holiday or that special party. Alternatively use daily to remove those unwanted hairs and keep your brows in perfect shape. The compact design has a rotary facial trimmer on one side and an eyebrow trimmer on the other, both with their own integrated lights. no need for two different trimmers. Remove hair fuzz from face, cheeks, upper lip, chin, legs, fingers etc efficiently and without any pain. The hyperallergenic heads do not cause and razor burn and is perfect for those with sensitive skin. The powerful lithium operates both heads independently and will last over 90 minutes continuous use from a full charge. The battery is quickly rechargeable via any USB power source, powerbank etc, and has a USB cable supplied. The pack includes: 1x Paul Anthony Facial / Eyebrow Trimmer 1x Cleaning Brush 1x USB Cable 1x Instruction Manual
